technical_skills.name: Ranking System Evaluation (NDCG, MRR, MAP, A/B Testing)

roles.title: Senior AI Engineer
work_done: Designed, built, and deployed production-grade retrieval, ranking, and matching systems, specifically for candidate-job description matching.
Led the architectural design and implementation of intelligence layers within product platforms.
Performed technical audits of existing ML systems, identified critical areas for improvement, and delivered high-impact solutions.
Developed and deployed V2 ranking systems incorporating embeddings, hybrid retrieval, and LLM-based re-ranking to enhance user engagement metrics.
Established robust evaluation frameworks, including offline benchmarks, online A/B testing, and user-feedback loops for continuous system improvement.
Mentored and provided technical guidance to engineering teams on ML system design and deployment.
Collaborated closely with product managers to define roadmaps and translate business needs into technical solutions for AI-driven features.
Demonstrated a strong product-engineering mindset, balancing technical excellence with rapid iteration and shipping valuable features quickly.
Possessed substantial pre-LLM era ML production experience, particularly in information retrieval and ranking.
Actively writes and contributes to production-level code, taking ownership from design to deployment and operationalization.

industry.name: Talent Intelligence / HR Technology / AI Product Development

education.field: Computer Science, AI, or related technical field
